/usr/bin/cc -fPIC    -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libfast_lio_sam_g__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/fast_lio_sam_g/libfast_lio_sam_g__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/fast_lio_sam_g__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/fast_lio_sam_g/msg/_pose6_d_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jacky/workspace/build/fast_lio_sam_g:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libfast_lio_sam_g__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libfast_lio_sam_g__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
